query: SELECT arquivo_id, COUNT(*) as total FROM recebimento_tiss WHERE arquivo_id IN (1020280, 1020281, 1020282, 1020283, 1020284, 1020285) GROUP BY arquivo_id ORDER BY arquivo_id
